info.DESCRIPTION: information about RNBO and the running system

system_id.DESCRIPTION: a unique, one time generated id for this system

compiler_version.DESCRIPTION: the version of the compiler that this executable was built with

compiler_id.DESCRIPTION: the id of the compiler that this executable was built with

disk_bytes_available.DESCRIPTION: a byte count (as a string) of the bytes available in the compile cache dir

datafile_dir_mtime.DESCRIPTION: the last modification time of the datafile directory, as a string representation, time since epoch

migration_available.DESCRIPTION: a rnbo version for existing data that may be migrated to this version. set it blank to indicate migration is complete.

outdated.DESCRIPTION: Number of outdated packages detected on the system

latest_runner_version.DESCRIPTION: A version string indicating the latest runner that can be installed with a given RNBO library version

new_update_service_version.DESCRIPTION: A version string indicating that there is a new rnbo-update-service version that can be installed

latest_dependency_versions.DESCRIPTION: A list of pairs of package name, package version for updates avaialble

supported.DESCRIPTION: Does this runner support remote upgrade/downgrade

is_active.DESCRIPTION: Gives the actual status of the jack server being active or not

aliases.DESCRIPTION: Ports and a list of their aliases

properties.DESCRIPTION: Ports and a list of their properties

system:capture_1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:capture_2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:playback_1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:playback_2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_capture_1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_capture_2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_capture_3.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

jack-transport-link:clock.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_playback_1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_playback_2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

system:midi_playback_3.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

rnbo-control:midiin.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

rnbo-record:in1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

rnbo-record:in2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:out1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:out2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:in1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:in2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:midiout1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.master-0:midiin1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.clickburst-1:out1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.clickburst-1:out2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.clickburst-1:midiout1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.clickburst-1:midiin1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.bells-3:out1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.bells-3:out2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.bells-3:midiout1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.bells-3:midiin1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.shepard-4:out1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.shepard-4:out2.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.shepard-4:midiout1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

mod.shepard-4:midiin1.DESCRIPTION: JSON key/value object indicating Jack properties for this port

is_realtime.DESCRIPTION: indicates if jack is running in realtime mode or not

owns_server.DESCRIPTION: indicates if the runner manages/owns the server or not

cpu_load.DESCRIPTION: The current CPU load percent estimated by JACK

xrun_count.DESCRIPTION: The count of xruns since the last server start

connections.DESCRIPTION: Jack connections: sources and their connected sinks, disconnect and connect utilities

connect.DESCRIPTION: connect 2 jack ports by name: source destination

disconnect.DESCRIPTION: disconnect 2 jack ports by name: source destination

num_periods.DESCRIPTION: Number of periods of playback latency

midi_system.DESCRIPTION: Which ALSA MIDI system to provide access to.

extra.DESCRIPTION: Extra args to be passed to jack when creating the server, these are appended after the args generated by sample_rate, period_frames, etc.

persist_extra.DESCRIPTION: Should the runner save/restore "extra" args associated with your "card", useful if you switch cards.

midi_in.DESCRIPTION: MIDI connection to use for control (patcher selection)

position.DESCRIPTION: Seek to a new beat time position

sync.DESCRIPTION: should the runner sync to/from jack's transport or not

io.DESCRIPTION: input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs
input and output counts: audio ins, audio outs, midi ins, midi outs

unload.DESCRIPTION: Unload a running instance by index, negative will unload all

load.DESCRIPTION: Load a pre-built patcher by name into the given index. args: index patcher_name [instance_name], a -1 index will create a new instance at the next available index, -2 will do the same but not auto connect it to anything

meta.DESCRIPTION: Set/get the metadata for the current set

save.DESCRIPTION: Save a set of instances assigning the given name

load.DESCRIPTION: Load a set with the given name

destroy.DESCRIPTION: Delete a set of instances with the given name

rename.DESCRIPTION: Rename a set of instances: oldName, newName

dirty.DESCRIPTION: Indication that the current set has unsaved changes

initial.DESCRIPTION: Give the name of the set (or none) that should load when the runner first starts

save.DESCRIPTION: Save a loaded set preset with the given name

load.DESCRIPTION: Load a loaded set preset with the given name

destroy.DESCRIPTION: Delete a loaded set preset with the given name

rename.DESCRIPTION: Rename the loaded set's preset: oldName, newName

create.DESCRIPTION: create a new set view, first parameter is the name, the rest compose the initial view parameter list

destroy.DESCRIPTION: destroy a view via its id, use a negative value to destroy all views

order.DESCRIPTION: set a sort order for the set views, using their ids

auto_connect_audio.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect newly activated instances to audio i/o

auto_connect_audio_indexed.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect newly activated instances to audio i/o, using the RNBO i/o index to inform the connections

auto_connect_midi.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect newly activated instances to midi i/o

auto_connect_midi_hardware.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect newly activated instances to midi hardware i/o

auto_connect_port_group.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect newly activated instances to midi/audio via the rnbo-graph-user-io port group property

auto_start_last.DESCRIPTION: Automatically start the last instance configuration on runner startup

audio_fade_in.DESCRIPTION: Fade in milliseconds when creating new instances

audio_fade_out.DESCRIPTION: Fade out milliseconds when closing instances

port_to_osc.DESCRIPTION: Map slash prefixed port names to/from OSC messages by default

preset_midi_program_change_channel.DESCRIPTION: Which channel (or none or omni) should listen for program changes to load a preset by index

in1.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

in2.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

out1.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

out2.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

midiin1.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

midiout1.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

name.DESCRIPTION: The name of the loaded patcher

set_preset_patcher_named.DESCRIPTION: Should set presets saved simply store the name of the last patcher instance preset loaded/saved

name_alias.DESCRIPTION: An alias to use when displaying this instance in a graph

entries.DESCRIPTION: A list of presets that can be loaded

save.DESCRIPTION: Save the current settings as a preset with the given name

rename.DESCRIPTION: rename a preset, arguments: oldname, newName

load.DESCRIPTION: Load a preset with the given name

loaded.DESCRIPTION: Indicates that a preset was loaded. A name with a / indiciates a set preset where the format is setname/setpresetname

delete.DESCRIPTION: Delete a preset with the given name

del.DESCRIPTION: Delete a preset with the given name

initial.DESCRIPTION: Indicate a preset, by name, that should be loaded every time this patch is reloaded. Set to an empty string to load the last loaded preset instead

midi_channel.DESCRIPTION: Indicate MIDI channel, none or omni (all) that should be used for changing presets via Program Changes.

in.DESCRIPTION: midi events in to your RNBO patch

out.DESCRIPTION: midi events out of your RNBO patch

value.DESCRIPTION: JSON encoded string representing the last MIDI mappable message seen by this instance, only reports if "report" is true

report.DESCRIPTION: Turn on/off publishing to the last "value" parameter

out1.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

out2.DESCRIPTION: Port and its connections, send port names to change, see /rnbo/jack/ports for names to connect

set_preset_midi_program_change_channel.DESCRIPTION: Which channel (or none or omni) should listen for program changes to load a set preset by index

control_auto_connect_midi.DESCRIPTION: Automatically connect control to midi outs

set_preset_default_patcher_named.DESCRIPTION: Default set presets store latest preset loaded in instance instead of all of its parameter values
